name: Pumpkin Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring frequently.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes or until thickened, stirring occasionally.
To store: Keep in the refrigerator for several weeks or freeze for several months. For those who can, pour hot mixture into sterilized canning jars and seal immediately.
Serving Ideas: Serve on toast, muffins, or cornbread.
